title: panicum orthum
intro: Panicum orthum, also known as Pearl Millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Panicum orthum include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and aiding in weight loss. The herbal preparations of Panicum orthum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
